title: COVID RUSH
desc: An indie game mechanics exploration built in Unity, turning a chaotic supply run into a fast, satirical 3D dash. Players navigate between safe (green) and epidemic (red) zones that shift with the BGM, collecting masks and vaccines while avoiding AI-controlled infected avatars.

categoryLabel: VR x Hand Tracking x Escape Room
title: 深海低吟 | Deep In Sea
desc: A VR escape room experience built in Unity with Oculus Quest 2 hand tracking. Players take on the role of an archaeologist who awakens inside a mysterious Victorian-era ship, solving four puzzles involving hand gesture recognition, magical drawing, lightsaber combat, and branching story paths to escape a mermaid's curse.

title: Time Lapse
desc: A sound art and audio-visual piece combining media transcription, modulation, and synesthetic experimentation. Using Ableton effects for sound modulation (echo, layering, repetition) and TouchDesigner for real-time audiovisual generation, the work reflects on the emotional arc of the pandemic—from anxiety to adaptation and coexistence.

exhibition.name: NYCU x TNUA【瘋城 This Crazy City】Online Headphone Concert
exhibition.institution: National Yang Ming Chiao Tung University (NYCU) & National Taiwan University of Arts (TNUA)

title: 墨染熹微 | Smudge of Dawn
desc: A GLSL generative art piece inspired by karesansui (dry landscape gardens) and traditional Chinese ink painting. The 'ground'—represented by white sand and water patterns—is generated through trigonometric functions applied to screen coordinates. Time-based variations create ripples that extend and flow like organic ink brush strokes, with granular sand textures and three white stones guiding the composition.

title: UE4 Workshop: 恬 / 霽月 / 歸
desc: A trilogy of digital landscapes created during a one-month UE4 workshop, building mountains, snow, water, sky, physics, wind fields, post-processing, and rendering from scratch. '恬' is inspired by Zhuge Liang's philosophy of tranquility; '霽月' projects emotions onto environments; '歸' explores homecoming through sunset hues.

title: GLSL Shaders Collection
desc: A collective series of graphics programming pieces exploring natural phenomena: 1. Waves (Voronoi/Metaballs/Ukiyo-e style), 2. Uncertain, 3. Breathing Light, 4. Reflection.

title: 匯聚的思念 | The Convergence of Longing
desc: Using Vermeer's painting 'Girl with a Pearl Earring' as the foundation, this work explores Brownian Motion and Random Walk algorithms to irregularly visualize the convergence of longing, remembrance, and digital dispersion.

title: 隧歲 | The Tunnel
desc: A point cloud animation centered around Hsinchu's Zhongzheng Road Night Market, scanned into a point cloud model. Atmospheric animations are created separately for daytime and nighttime, incorporating mist, lighting variations, color shifts, particle dynamics, post-processing, and field-recorded sounds to convey an audiovisual experience that traverses time and space in Hsinchu's old town.

title: はる | Haru
desc: An atmospheric exploration created in Unreal Engine 5 investigating themes of fading memory. 'Who is calling? While Haru has withered away... through the pulse of sakura.' Powered by Niagara particle systems and custom material shaders.

title: 植•栽 | Planted for Planting
desc: An immersive puzzle-solving game built in Unreal Engine 5. Players explore a maze, solve planting puzzles (hint: related to number of leaves), and nurture the World Tree. Combines maze exploration with open environments, utilizing Niagara particle systems to symbolize environmental restoration and the continuation of life.

title: 緒絮 | Threads of Thought
desc: This work centers around the visualization of brain consciousness space, connecting Arduino with UE5 to create visuals that model rational chemical molecular movements (biological neural transmission) and emotional, abstract imaginative spaces. Simple sensors serve as interactive devices to realize human stimuli in this brain consciousness space as a medium.

title: 存在觀察 | Existence Observation
desc: A two-device, four-stage multimedia installation. Device one uses a 'window' (door) as a symbolic visual medium, with the exhibition space recreated as a point cloud model in Unreal Engine 5. When viewers pause before it, they glimpse the invisible particles—data, consciousness, imagination—that construct human experience. Device two presents 'whispers' on the ground. Stages progress from an inviting tunnel of light, to a theatrical dawn, to energy and existence, and finally to consciousness and emotion.

exhibition.name: 虛構｜The Pledge｜L'Engagement 物質性演算美學展
exhibition.location: NYCU Yang Ming Campus, College of Humanities and Social Sciences, Zhi Xing Art Space
exhibition.event: Opening and Immaculate Dance Theater Forum: 10/6 12:00-15:30

title: 痕跡 | Traces
desc: Drawing inspiration from ceramic crazing (開片) technique, this work explores the aesthetic dialogue between temporality and human intervention. Cracks are treated as tangible representations of time, simulated via Quadtree algorithms and procedural generation. The work extends crack expressions into diverse visual forms including crystal engraving, ripples, and skin meridians, liberating cracks from the traditional ceramic framework into contemporary digital art. Keywords: Digital Art, Quadtree, Crazing, Multimedia.

exhibition.name: GDAP#13 閾質 (LIMINAL)
exhibition.location: No. 256, Section 1, Dihua Street, Datong District, Taipei City (Near Daqiaotou MRT Station)

note: Paper submissions have not been made public yet.

title: 水族魚生 | AquaVerse
desc: An augmented reality mobile application where viewers use smartphones to explore an underwater world. Users interact with fish on the screen, and an introduction panel for each fish dynamically appears on the mobile device, providing knowledge about different species in an engaging and immersive way.

categoryLabel: AR Mixed Image Recognition & AIoT Game
title: 垃圾車等等我 | Garbage Truck, Wait for Me
desc: A home fitness game app developed through industry-school collaboration with Field Technology Ltd. and NOBOLLEL. Using AR mixed image recognition and AIoT rapid game module construction, the app uses motion sensing via smartphone cameras to detect body movements combined with gamification. Inspired by the Taiwanese cultural experience of chasing the garbage truck, the game makes fitness accessible, fun, and equipment-free for all ages.

title: 洄鄉 | Echo-me
desc: An interactive installation interweaving silhouettes of humans and fish into a species fusion—'human but not human, fish but not fish.' Abstract contours depict a 'homeward migration' across urban landscapes and shimmering waters. The installation detects viewers' presence and generates new on-screen characters that join the procession, symbolizing the integration and continuity of human history with nature.

exhibition.name: 2025六燃文件展：洄游六燃。洄游頭前溪
exhibition.location: B1, Haoran Library, NYCU Hsinchu Campus
